artifacts.purpose: Data, model family, solver settings, acceptance criteria, and run command.
Current solver status, objective, bound, gap, elapsed time, ETA, and error state.
Longitudinal solver progress, completed/total units, percent, ETA, throughput, gap, feasibility, and incumbent information.
Exported model files such as lp, mps, nl, or package-specific artifacts.
Decision-variable values, objective reconstruction, constraint checks, and benchmark gaps.
